Title: Login Event - User Authentication
Preconditions:
[PRE:CLEAR_SESSION]
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
Valid user account; DevTools Console open
Assertions:
[STATE] gtm.load event present in dataLayer
[STATE] user_id set in GA config object
[FORMAT] currency field present in GA config
[FORMAT] language field present in GA config
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors during login flow
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on auth API requests
[API] login GraphQL mutation returns valid userId
Failure_Signals: GA config event absent from dataLayer; user_id missing or null after login; currency/language fields missing from config

[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
User logged in; DevTools Console open

[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/snacks
[WAIT] wait for product grid to load
[ASSERT] execute window.dataLayer.filter(e => e[1] === 'view_item_list') in console
[ASSERT] inspect returned event object
Assertions:
[STATE] event name = view_item_list present in dataLayer
[DOM] item_list_id field is non-empty string
[DOM] item_list_name includes category name
[FORMAT] items_skus is CSV string of product SKUs
[MATH] items_count matches number of visible products on page

[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on catalog API requests
[API] GraphQL category query returns products array
Failure_Signals: view_item_list absent from dataLayer; items_count mismatches visible product count; items_skus empty or malformed

Title: clear_cart - Clear All Items
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
Cart will be seeded with multiple items inside the test (RESET_CART empties it first)
Steps:
[ACT] Ensure the cart has 2+ line items — if empty after RESET_CART, add 2 distinct in-stock products from the catalog
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[WAIT] wait for the line items to render
[ACT] Record the pre-clear cart total and the number of line items (for comparison)
[ACT] click Clear Cart button
[ACT] confirm the clear action in dialog
[WAIT] wait for cart to show empty state
[ASSERT] execute window.dataLayer.filter(e => e[1] === 'clear_cart') in console and read its params (entry[2])
Assertions:
[STATE] A clear_cart event is present (entry e[1]==='clear_cart')
[FORMAT] params currency = USD
[MATH] params value equals the cart total recorded BEFORE clearing (a positive amount > 0) — clear_cart reports the value of the cart that was cleared, NOT 0
[DOM] params items[] is NON-EMPTY and lists the line items that were in the cart at clear time (each with item_id, item_name, price, quantity)
[MATH] params items_count equals the number of line items that were in the cart before clearing (> 0)
[STATE] By GA4 convention this event documents WHAT WAS CLEARED — do NOT expect value=0 or an empty items array
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors during cart clear
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on clear cart mutation
[API] clearCart GraphQL mutation errors[] is empty
Failure_Signals: clear_cart absent from dataLayer; value is 0 or items[] empty (would mean it failed to report the cleared cart contents); items_count does not match the number of items that were cleared
Cleanup: Re-add test items to cart if needed for subsequent tests
References: google-analytics; vc-frontend google-analytics/events.ts (clearCart) + cart.vue (analytics clearCart on empty)

Title: add_shipping_info - Switch Methods
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]

[ACT] switch to Pickup shipping option
[ASSERT] execute window.dataLayer.filter(e => e[1] === 'add_shipping_info') — verify latest entry has shipping_tier=Pickup and value=0
[ACT] switch back to Ground shipping option
[ASSERT] execute window.dataLayer.filter(e => e[1] === 'add_shipping_info') — verify latest entry has shipping_tier=Ground and value=150

[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on repeated shipping updates

Failure_Signals: events not firing on each switch; stale value from previous method persisting; value = 150 on Pickup (regression of fixed bug)

Title: purchase - Payment Complete (Order-Context — Unpaid Order Pay Now Flow)
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
Order with Payment Required status exists; Authorize.Net test card ready
- SYNC VCST-5162: Covers the ORDER-CONTEXT path (/account/orders → Pay Now → /checkout/payment). UNCHANGED by VCST-5162 — AN still redirects to /checkout/payment for existing unpaid orders; the CART-CONTEXT now uses inline (PAY-AN-016 covers AN cart GA4). Expiry format for AN: MM/YYYY (e.g. 12/2029).
- NOTE: Non-standard {{TEST_CARD_AUTHORIZE_NET}} var replaced with AUTHORIZENET_VISA.number / .expiry / .cvv aliases per test-data policy.
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders; find an order with 'Payment Required' status (or place a manual-method order to create one)
[ACT] open the order detail page
[ACT] click 'Pay Now' button
[WAIT] wait for redirect to {{FRONT_URL}}/checkout/payment with Authorize.Net form (order-context — expected; VCST-5162 only moved cart-context to inline)
[ACT] enter test card number '@td(AUTHORIZENET_VISA.number)' in card number field
[ACT] fill in expiry date '@td(AUTHORIZENET_VISA.expiry)' (MM/YYYY format) and CVV '@td(AUTHORIZENET_VISA.cvv)'
[ACT] click 'Submit Payment' or 'Pay' button
[WAIT] wait for payment success confirmation page
[ASSERT] execute window.dataLayer.filter(e => e[1] === 'purchase') in console
Assertions:
[STATE] event name = purchase present in dataLayer after order-context payment completes
[FORMAT] currency = USD
[MATH] value equals order total
[MATH] shipping equals shipping cost
[MATH] tax equals tax amount
[DOM] items array contains all purchased line items
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors during payment submission
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on payment API
[API] payment processor response indicates success
Failure_Signals: purchase absent from dataLayer after successful payment; event fires on place_order instead of after payment confirmation; value/shipping/tax mismatches; legacy {{TEST_CARD_AUTHORIZE_NET}} var referenced in steps (must be @td)
References: google-analytics; Synced: VCST-5162 (test data vars {{TEST_CARD_AUTHORIZE_NET}} replaced with AUTHORIZENET_VISA.number/.expiry/.cvv aliases; order-context path unchanged; flow clarification + expiry format documented)

Title: Event Items - view_item Product Structure
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
Any product event available; user on product page
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to any product detail page on {{FRONT_URL}}
[WAIT] wait for the page to load, then allow ~2-3s for the GA4 push to settle
[ASSERT] execute window.dataLayer.filter(e => e[1] === 'view_item') to get the view_item gtag entry
[ASSERT] inspect the event params (entry[2]) and items[0] structure
Assertions:
[STATE] A 'view_item' gtag event is present (entry[1]==='view_item'); its params live in entry[2]
[DOM] event params carry top-level currency (e.g. 'USD') and a numeric value
[DOM] items[0].item_id equals the product SKU/code
[DOM] items[0].item_name equals the product name
[MATH] items[0].price is a number (this is the product list price)
[DOM] items[0].affiliation equals the vendor name; item_category hierarchy fields (item_category, item_category2, item_category3, up to 5 levels) present when the product has breadcrumbs
[STATE] items[0] does NOT carry a quantity field on view_item — quantity is emitted on add_to_cart, not view_item; do not assert quantity here
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors on product page load
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on product detail API
[API] GraphQL product query returns category hierarchy and affiliation data
Failure_Signals: item_id missing or wrong; price not a number; top-level currency/value missing; category hierarchy absent when breadcrumbs exist; affiliation missing. (Do NOT fail on quantity — it is intentionally absent from view_item.)

Title: Event Persistence - dataLayer Accumulates Across In-App Actions
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
Fresh session. The dataLayer is append-only within a single SPA session but is reset by a hard full-page reload — perform ALL navigation in this test via in-app link clicks, never a new page load.
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}} (initial load)
[WAIT] wait for storefront to load
[ACT] enter 'laptop' in the search field and submit (search-bar)
[WAIT] wait for the search results, allow ~3s for the GA push
[ASSERT] read window.dataLayer; verify a view_search_results gtag event is present
[ACT] click a product card in the results to open its PDP (in-app navigation — do NOT hard-reload)
[WAIT] wait for the PDP, allow ~2-3s
[ASSERT] read window.dataLayer; verify a view_item event is now also present while the earlier view_search_results entry is still in the array
[ACT] add the product to the cart (quantity + stepper)
[WAIT] wait for the cart badge to update, allow ~2s
[ASSERT] read window.dataLayer; verify an add_to_cart event is now present alongside the prior view_search_results and view_item entries
Assertions:
[STATE] dataLayer is append-only within the SPA session: after search -> PDP -> add-to-cart (all via in-app navigation), view_search_results, view_item, and add_to_cart all coexist in the array
[STATE] add_to_cart items[0] carries quantity (e.g. 1) and a top-level source_route — unlike view_item, which carries no quantity
[STATE] Repeated same-name events (e.g. view_item_list firing more than once across the flow) are normal and MUST NOT be treated as a defect
[STATE] A hard full-page reload starts a fresh dataLayer (prior events gone); this test keeps navigation in-app so events accumulate
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors across all navigation steps
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on any API calls during session
[API] all GraphQL queries return valid data
Failure_Signals: an expected event (view_search_results / view_item / add_to_cart) missing after its action; dataLayer reset mid-flow due to an accidental hard navigation. (Do NOT fail on duplicate same-name events or strict ordering — both are expected.)

Title: VCST-4800 — Redirect-Processor Checkout Fires Exactly One purchase Event via finalizePayment Path
Preconditions:
[PRE:CLEAR_SESSION]
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
Authenticated user; DevTools Console open; A redirect-payment-processor is active on the store (Datatrans ONLY — the only remaining redirect-to-/checkout/payment processor as of VCST-5162); NOTE: Skyflow uses cart-embedded flow (AllowCartPayment=true, VCST-5009); Authorize.Net now ALSO uses cart-embedded flow (AllowCartPayment=true, VCST-5162) — do NOT use Authorize.Net for this test. Use Datatrans only. CyberSource is also cart-embedded (covered by GA-026). VCST-4800 fix deployed (analytics('purchase') call present in useCheckout.ts)
[MCP:CHROME_DEVTOOLS] Chrome DevTools MCP required — test uses window.dataLayer inspection via DevTools Console; assign to agent with Chrome DevTools MCP access
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/catalog or {{FRONT_URL}}/search
[ACT] add one in-stock item to cart

Title: VCST-4800 — No Duplicate purchase Event When Existing Unpaid Order Re-processed via CyberSource
Preconditions:
[PRE:CLEAR_SESSION]
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
Authenticated user; DevTools Console open; CyberSource payment processor active; An existing unpaid order exists (created but payment not yet captured — order in 'New' or 'Payment required' status); VCST-4800 fix deployed
[MCP:CHROME_DEVTOOLS] Chrome DevTools MCP required — test uses window.dataLayer inspection via DevTools Console; assign to agent with Chrome DevTools MCP access
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders
[WAIT] orders list loads
[ACT] locate an existing unpaid order (status 'Payment required' or equivalent)
[ASSERT] unpaid order is present in the list (if none, create a new order and abandon at payment step — see Preconditions)
[NAV] navigate to the payment retry page for the unpaid order (follow 'Pay now' or equivalent link)
[WAIT] CyberSource payment form displayed for the existing order
[ACT] fill in CyberSource test card details
[ACT] submit payment
[WAIT] payment processed; order status updates to 'Paid' or 'Processing'
[ASSERT] inspect window.dataLayer: window.dataLayer.filter(e => e[1] === 'purchase').length === 0
[ASSERT] no purchase event fired for re-processing an existing order (orderToPay guard: since orderToPay is set, CyberSource component does NOT fire analytics; since this is not a finalizePayment redirect, useCheckout.ts also does not fire)
[ASSERT] order status on /account/orders page shows 'Paid' or equivalent (payment succeeded)
Assertions:
[STATE] zero purchase events in dataLayer after re-paying an existing unpaid CyberSource order
[STATE] if (!orderToPay) guard in CyberSource component correctly prevents analytics call for existing-order payment retry
[STATE] payment still succeeds (no regression to payment functionality)
[DOM] order status updates from 'Payment required' to 'Paid' (or equivalent storefront label)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors during payment-retry flow
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on payment-retry submission
[API] order status mutation completes without errors
Failure_Signals: A purchase event fires when re-processing an existing unpaid order via CyberSource (duplicate tracking bug — VCST-4800 regression for the guard logic); purchase event fires with wrong order data (stale order id or zero value from orderToPay scenario); Payment submission fails (guard interfered with payment logic)

Title: VCST-5109 — view_item_list Contains items[] Array with Enriched Fields
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
User logged in; DevTools Console open; category page with visible product list
Steps:
[NAV] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/snacks (or any category page with a visible product list)
[WAIT] product grid fully rendered — at least 1 product card visible
[ASSERT] execute window.dataLayer.filter(e => e.event === 'view_item_list') in console — capture first matching entry
[ASSERT] inspect gtm.eventModel (or top-level event fields) inside the captured entry
Assertions:
[STATE] event.event === 'view_item_list' present in dataLayer
[DOM] item_list_id is a non-empty string (e.g. 'recently_browsed_products' or category-derived id)
[DOM] item_list_name is a non-empty string (e.g. 'Recently browsed' or category name)
[DOM] items key holds an Array (Array.isArray check passes)
[DOM] items.length >= 1 (at least one item object in array)
[DOM] items[0].item_id equals product SKU of first visible card (non-empty string)
[DOM] items[0].item_name equals product name of first visible card (non-empty string)
[DOM] items[0].brand key is present (string value)
[DOM] items[0].affiliation key is present
[DOM] items[0].currency is a non-empty string (e.g. 'USD')
[STATE] NO items_skus string field at top level of event — old format must be absent
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors on category page load
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on catalog GraphQL query
[API] GraphQL products query returns name, SKU, brand, vendor fields
Failure_Signals: view_item_list absent from dataLayer; items is a string (old items_skus format) not an array; items[0].item_id missing or empty; items_skus still present alongside new items array (dual-format regression); currency key absent from item objects

Title: VCST-5109 — view_item_list items[] Schema: All Required Fields Present Across All Items
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]

Steps:

[WAIT] product grid fully rendered

[ASSERT] iterate all entries in items and inspect each item object for required keys
Assertions:
[STATE] items is a non-empty array
[DOM] every item in items[] has key item_id (product SKU — non-empty string)
[DOM] every item in items[] has key item_name (non-empty string)
[DOM] every item in items[] has key brand (key present; string value)
[DOM] every item in items[] has key affiliation (key present)
[DOM] every item in items[] has key currency (non-empty string)

Title: VCST-5009 — Skyflow Cart-Flow Checkout Fires Exactly One purchase Event
Section: GA Events > Purchase > Skyflow Cart Path
Preconditions:
[PRE:CLEAR_SESSION]
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
Authenticated user WITHOUT saved Skyflow cards (so new-card iframe renders immediately; for users with saved cards select 'Add new card' from the 'Select credit card' dropdown first); DevTools Console open (window.dataLayer GTM-backed); Skyflow payment processor active with AllowCartPayment=true; VCST-5009 deployed
[MCP:CHROME_DEVTOOLS] Chrome DevTools MCP required — test uses window.dataLayer inspection via DevTools Console; assign to agent with Chrome DevTools MCP access
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/catalog or {{FRONT_URL}}/search
[ACT] add one in-stock item to cart
[WAIT] cart badge updates
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[WAIT] cart page loads with item AND Skyflow iframe fields render inline (no redirect)
[ACT] select 'Bank card (Skyflow)'; if 'Select credit card' dropdown appears, select 'Add new card'
[WAIT] Skyflow iframe fields visible: Card number / Cardholder name / Expiration date / Security code
[ACT] fill '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.number)' in Card number; fill '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.expiry)' in Expiration date; fill '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.cvv)' in Security code
[WAIT] 'Place order' button becomes enabled (isPaymentDataValid=true)
[ACT] click 'Place order'
[WAIT] payment processes; order confirmation or /checkout/completed loads
[ASSERT] inspect window.dataLayer in DevTools Console: window.dataLayer.filter(e => e[1] === 'purchase' || e.event === 'purchase').length === 1
[ASSERT] the single purchase event has: value field is a positive number (order total); items array is non-empty; transaction_id field present
[ASSERT] no second purchase event present (analytics('purchase') fires only for cart-flow, not orderToPay-driven per PR #2308)
Assertions:
[STATE] exactly one purchase event in dataLayer after Skyflow cart-flow checkout
[STATE] purchase event value > 0 and matches order confirmation total
[STATE] purchase event items array contains the ordered product(s)
[FORMAT] purchase event structure matches GA4 ecommerce schema: event name, currency, value, items[]
[DOM] order confirmation page loaded (not stuck on /cart or /checkout/payment)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors during Skyflow cart-embedded payment flow
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on order confirmation load
[API] createOrderFromCart mutation returns no errors
Failure_Signals: No purchase event in dataLayer after Skyflow cart-flow order (analytics('purchase') missing from payment-processing-skyflow.vue cart path); duplicate purchase event (fired twice); purchase event fires before order confirmed; event fires on orderToPay-driven path (should NOT — conditional in PR#2308)
Cleanup: Remove test order; navigate to /account/orders to confirm order created
References: VCST-5009; PR#2308 (analytics purchase fires only when !orderToPay-driven); BL-GA4-003; Synced: VCST-5009 (2026-06-04)

Title: VCST-5009 — Skyflow add_payment_info Event Has Stale Values When Cart Mutated After Form Mounts (Known Issue F6 / VCST-5198)
Section: GA Events > add_payment_info > Skyflow Cart Path
Preconditions:
[PRE:CLEAR_SESSION]
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
Authenticated user; DevTools Console open (window.dataLayer); Skyflow payment processor active; VCST-5009 deployed; Chrome DevTools MCP required
NOTE: This case CURRENTLY FAILS — add_payment_info carries stale value/items_count when cart is mutated after the Skyflow form mounts. Exploratory finding F6 from VCST-5009 testing (2026-06-04). Assertions are written for CORRECT behavior so the case fails until the bug is fixed. Do NOT change assertions to match stale behavior.
[MCP:CHROME_DEVTOOLS]
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart with one item
[WAIT] Skyflow payment section renders inline; note initial cart total T1
[ACT] select 'Bank card (Skyflow)'; wait for Skyflow form
[ACT] increase qty of the cart item by 1 using quantity stepper
[WAIT] cart total updates to T2 (T2 > T1)
[ACT] fill Skyflow Card number '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.number)'; fill Expiration date '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.expiry)'; fill Security code '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.cvv)'
[WAIT] 'Place order' button enabled
[ACT] click 'Place order'
[WAIT] order confirmation or /checkout/completed loads
[ASSERT] inspect window.dataLayer in DevTools Console: locate add_payment_info event; verify event value = T2 (the UPDATED total after qty increase, NOT stale T1)
[ASSERT] add_payment_info event items array reflects updated quantity (not pre-mutation quantity)
Assertions:
[STATE] add_payment_info event value = T2 (post-mutation total, not stale T1)
[STATE] add_payment_info items quantity reflects post-mutation qty
NOTE: These assertions are CORRECT behavior — this case will FAIL until the stale-capture bug is fixed
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors during cart mutation and Skyflow payment
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on order placement
Failure_Signals: add_payment_info event value = T1 (stale, captured before qty mutation — THIS IS THE KNOWN BUG); items quantity does not reflect updated quantity
References: VCST-5198 (bug ticket, filed 2026-06-04); VCST-5009 exploratory finding F6 confirmed by second-source repro 2026-06-04; BL-GA4-003; Synced: VCST-5009 (2026-06-04)
